title: Possible docker alignments between buildenv and run
body:
@wallento looking at using buildenv docker (thanks) and doing "diff -u buildenv/Dockerfile run/Dockerfile" suggests some minor differences & maybe they should be closer?

```
-    && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive \
-       apt-get install --no-install-recommends -y \
+    && apt-get install --no-install-recommends -y \
```

Might as well match.

```
+                        ccache \
+                        libgoogle-perftools-dev \
```

Should be in both.

```
+ARG REPO=https://github.com/verilator/verilator
+ARG SOURCE_COMMIT=master
-RUN git clone https://github.com/veripool/vcddiff.git && \
+RUN git clone "${REPO}" verilator && \
```

Might as well do similarly.

```
-ENV VERILATOR_AUTHOR_SITE=1
+WORKDIR /work
```

Might as well have both in both - not having the WORKDIR in buildenv is how I noticed these deltas.

Thanks
